mechanism: The fiscal deficit contributes 1.5-2.4pp to headline GDP growth. Stripping this fiscal demand reveals private-sector growth of only 1.0-1.5%, near or below stall speed. The fiscal deficit mechanically masks private-sector weakness.
regime_dependence: Holds as long as the deficit remains at 6-7% GDP. If deficit narrows >1pp GDP while growth stays >2.5%, the relationship may be weaker than estimated.
